name: qrdock
description: qrdock — free QR code & barcode generator with letters-in-QR, dynamic codes and scan analytics. Powered by Nexorium Systems Private Limited.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w web && npm run typecheck -w server
